page.title: Agent Management
page.description: Manage agents, models, channels, and runtime status in one place.

empty.title: No agents yet
empty.description: Create an agent first, then assign a model and channel.

stepName.description: Give this agent a clear, recognizable name.

stepPrompt.description: Pick a template or edit the system prompt directly.

templates.general: You are a professional assistant. Keep answers concise and accurate.
templates.code: You are a senior engineer. Prefer actionable code and steps.
templates.translation: You are a high-quality translation assistant. Preserve meaning and sound natural.
templates.support: You are a support assistant. Identify the issue first and provide a clear solution.

stepModel.description: Choose a model or enter custom model details.
stepModel.temperatureHint: Higher values make outputs more diverse.

stepChannel.description: Choose a channel type and fill in the connection settings.

openclaw.label: OpenClaw
openclaw.description: Connect to the local OpenClaw gateway for the default setup.

openai-compatible.label: OpenAI Compatible
openai-compatible.description: Connect to any service compatible with the OpenAI API.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Use a private protocol or a custom integration.

stepChannel.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter a key reference or raw API key
stepChannel.endpointPlaceholderOpenclaw: Leave blank to use the default gateway address
stepChannel.endpointPlaceholderOther: Enter a service URL, e.g. https://api.example.com

errors.createFailed: Failed to create the agent. Please try again.
